message:
test(test_artifacts): add 32 property-based tests for manifest validation (wa-1u90p.7.1)

Covers serde roundtrips for ArtifactRunOutcome, ArtifactKind, ArtifactFormat,
ArtifactCorrelation, StageTimingMetrics, ArtifactEntry, and TestArtifactManifest.
Tests validate() invariants: schema version, run_id, test_case_id, correlation
identity, negative timing rejection, percentile monotonicity, SHA256 format,
empty artifacts, failure artifact requirements for Failed/Aborted outcomes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
